rulings.Case Title: NARCISO S HILO III VS. FIRST FINANCIAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 22, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off calendar. Failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6c and court's Feb-29-2012 order re compliance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEN JUE VS. KATE MERRIGAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Non-Statutory Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 22, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF KEN JUE's Motion And Non-Statutory Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Grant, subject to opposition and moving party providing proof of daily damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MS MISSION HOLDING, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC., A DELAWARE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Strike Defts Request For Jury Trial And Set Case For Court Trial
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 22, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF MS MISSION HOLDING, LLC's Motion To Strike Defendants Request For Jury Trial And Set Case For Court Trial. Grant, subject to opposition and granting of motion for summary judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MS MISSION HOLDING, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC., A DELAWARE
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 22, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF MS MISSION HOLDING, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant motion for summary judgment, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
